text_blocks: Terms of Service | SEO Dada

This Terms and Conditions of Use ("Agreement") is entered into between you (either as an individual user or as an authorized representative of an organization) and Fourth Dimension SEO Dada ("Company", "we", "us", or "our"), and governs your access to and use of our services.

By accessing or using Fourth Dimension SEO Dada, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by the terms of this Agreement. If you do not agree, you should not use the Service.

Fourth Dimension SEO Dada is a real-time SEO clarity tool that allows users to analyze publicly accessible webpages. It provides insights into keyword usage, heading hierarchy, metadata presence, image alt attributes, link structure, and sitemap connections. The Service is designed to support users in planning, auditing, and optimizing content strategy and technical structure.
Account: Your registered access to Fourth Dimension SEO Dada Services
User: Any individual or entity accessing or using the Service
Audit: Any scan or analysis initiated using Fourth Dimension SEO Dada
Content: Data input, scanned, or otherwise processed using Fourth Dimension SEO Dada
To use the Service, you must be:
At least 18 years of age or the legal age of majority in your jurisdiction
Legally capable of entering into a binding agreement
Providing accurate, truthful account information
If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that entity to this Agreement.
You must register for an account to use Fourth Dimension SEO Dada. You agree to:
Provide accurate and complete information during sign-up
Maintain the security of your login credentials
Accept full responsibility for all activities under your account
You must not share your login credentials or allow others to access your account unless authorized through a team or agency plan.
Scan or attempt to scan websites you do not have the right to access
Use the Service to bypass robots.txt or similar restrictions
Reproduce, resell, or commercially redistribute audit outputs unless permitted
Reverse-engineer, duplicate, or clone the Fourth Dimension SEO Dada platform
Introduce malware, interfere with systems, or disrupt the Service
Misrepresent your identity or relationship to scanned websites
Fourth Dimension SEO Dada offers multiple subscription plans. By subscribing to a paid plan, you agree to:
Pay all fees associated with your selected plan
Allow automatic billing at the start of each billing cycle unless canceled in advance
Pay applicable taxes
You are responsible for updating your billing information.
Your use of the Service is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Key points:
We do not store full-page content beyond the scope of each audit
We do not sell or share your data with third-party advertisers
You retain ownership of your scanned URLs and audit reports
You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting our support team.

All rights, title, and interest in Fourth Dimension SEO Dada, including software, interface, visual elements, logic, and brand assets, are the exclusive property of Fourth Dimension SEO Dada. You may not:
Copy, reproduce, or adapt any part of the platform
Claim ownership over generated reports
Use Fourth Dimension SEO Dada's name, logo, or branding without written permission
You may terminate your account at any time through the dashboard or by contacting support. We may terminate or suspend your account if:
You breach any provision of this Agreement
Your use creates risk to other users or the system
As required by law
Upon termination, your access will be revoked and stored data may be deleted.
Fourth Dimension SEO Dada is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We make no guarantees regarding:
SEO rankings, traffic, or visibility outcomes
Platform compatibility with all CMS or web systems
Uptime or error-free operation
You acknowledge that insights provided are based on live data and public structures, and may change as websites are updated.
To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, including:
Loss of revenue or business opportunities
Damaged reputation or client relations
Data loss or inaccurate insights
In all cases, our total liability shall not exceed the amount you have paid to Fourth Dimension SEO Dada in the previous twelve (12) months.
This Agreement shall be governed by applicable laws. Any disputes shall be subject to the appropriate jurisdiction of competent courts.

We may update this Agreement to reflect changes in law, platform features, or internal policies. You will be notified of material changes by email or via the platform. Continued use of the Service after such changes constitutes acceptance.

By using our services, you acknowledge that you have read and understood these Terms of Service and agree to be bound by them. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that engage in prohibited activity.
For questions regarding these Terms, please contact our support team.

flow.text: Terms of Service | SEO Dada
Terms of Service

Fourth Dimension SEO Dada is a real-time SEO clarity tool that allows users to analyze publicly accessible webpages. It provides insights into keyword usage, heading hierarchy, metadata presence, image alt attributes, link structure, and sitemap connections. The Service is designed to support users in planning, auditing, and optimizing content strategy and technical structure.
Key Definitions
Account: Your registered access to Fourth Dimension SEO Dada Services
